mapper.sql: sku_id, sku_name, price, stock, category_id, category_name, brand_id, brand_name, description, status, create_time, update_time, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM product ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET status = 1, version = version + 1 WHERE sku_id = #{skuId}
UPDATE product SET status = 0, version = version + 1 WHERE sku_id = #{skuId}
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM product WHERE sku_id IN
#{id}
